blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 51°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
